'''Nalrithians''' were a very muscular [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoids]] native to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
Nalrithians born from the same clutch of eggs were known as eggmates and were known to share a [[Hive mind/Legends|hive mind]], which meant that their memories would be shared among them.

Notable members of the species included the notorious [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Cypher Bos]] who almost killed [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] during the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Reconnaissance mission to Ord Mantell|first mission to Ord Mantell]].
